beats.narration_text: Kumusta. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of quantum revival explorer. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of quantum revival explorer
output: ✓ Quantum Revival Explorer — Superposition Breathing in a Box

beats.narration_text: Quantum Revival Explorer is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. Drop a wavepacket in an infinite square well — watch it deform, spread, and at T_rev reconstruct from incommensurable frequencies alone.. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Quantum Revival Explorer. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: Terms N. Verify: Drop a wavepacket in an infinite square well — watch it deform, spread, and at T_rev reconstruct from incommensurable fr. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Quantum Revival Explorer. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: Terms N. Verify: Drop a wavepacket in an infin

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from quantum-revival-box-explorer.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: quantum revival explorer. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag Terms N from 1 to 20. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of Terms N from 1 to 20

beats.narration_text: Drop a wavepacket in an infinite square well — watch it deform, spread, and at T_rev reconstruct from incommensurable frequencies alone.. Exactly as the equations predict.
One prompt. A live demonstration of quantum revival explorer. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Quantum Revival Explorer simulation and add a second slider that controls Terms N. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

props.command: Take this Quantum Revival Explorer simulation and add a second slider that controls Terms N. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

beats.narration_text: Quantum Revival Explorer — Superposition Breathing in a Box. Medhavy.
beats.new_visual_element: Outro: Quantum Revival Explorer — Superposition Breathing in a Box · @Medhavy
